code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = tokenize(line)
let collapsed = collapse(tokens)
println(format_list(collapsed))

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn collapse(_ tokens: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not has_prev or v != prev
        result = list.push(result, v)
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end
